brand.trustPolicy: All claims are phase-gated and evidence-first. No NID, PIN, or sensitive identifiers are published.
brand.zoneBPolicy: Zone B: non-private/ejmali land — removable use only. No permanent structures until legal verification.
brand.copyright: © 2026 Kutirchar EcoFarm — Emon Hossain. All rights reserved. Brand locked: 21 June 2026.
brand.bdContextBanner: Bangladesh's char-land evidence-first smart farm — a rural model for food self-sufficiency
brand.nationalAlignment: DLS · BLRI · SREDA · IDCOL · PKSF — Bangladesh Government Frameworks
brand.digitalDivide: Starlink + CCTV + Dashboard — bridging the rural digital divide

home.whatIsDesc1: A proof-based, phased rural smart farm in Kutirchar, Sirajganj — integrating cattle, biogas, silage, solar, and digital monitoring into a circular ecosystem.
home.whatIsDesc2: Every phase is gated by evidence. No phase begins without documented proof from the previous stage. Built for bank officers, government stakeholders, and serious investors.
home.ecosystemDesc: Cattle → manure → biogas → bio-slurry → Napier grass → cattle. Every output is an input. Every cycle builds value.
home.proofDesc: Bank-ready, government-ready, investor-ready. All gaps are publicly documented. No hidden issues.
home.climateResilience: Sirajganj flood/erosion context — phase-gated, anticipatory climate adaptation
home.howItWorksDesc: A circular loop where nothing is wasted. Each phase builds on verified proof from the previous one.
home.phase0Desc: Land review, boundary survey, soil test, legal status — all documented before any construction
home.phase1Desc: 2–3 cows, Napier fodder, small solar, CCTV — first operational evidence
home.phase2Desc: Compost, silage, bio-slurry — closing the nutrient loop
home.phase3Desc: 6m³ digester, expanded solar, irrigation — energy independence

project.heroSubtitle: Kutirchar EcoFarm is a proof-based smart farm and circular energy ecosystem in Kutirchar, Sirajganj. Every phase is gated by evidence. No phase begins without documented proof from the previous stage.
project.whatIsDesc1: A rural circular ecosystem in Kutirchar, Bhadraghat, Kamarkhanda, Sirajganj. The project integrates cattle and dairy farming, biogas production from manure, Napier grass cultivation for silage and fodder, bio-slurry fertilizer, rooftop solar power, and digital farm monitoring — all on private family land.
project.whatIsDesc2: The circular loop: livestock produce manure → manure feeds biogas → biogas gives energy + bio-slurry → bio-slurry fertilizes Napier → Napier feeds livestock. Each output reduces cost. Each cycle builds asset value.
project.zoneBRule: Zone B (12 decimal non-private/ejmali land): removable use only — fodder racks, temporary shade, portable compost, water tank. No permanent concrete structures until legal verification is complete.
project.why1Body: Family land in Kutirchar represents long-term asset value. Proper documentation, boundary survey, and legal clarity must come before any construction.
project.why2Body: Instead of large upfront investment, each phase is self-funded from the output of the previous phase. No phase moves forward without verified proof.
project.why3Body: Every decision has a stop rule. Soil test before foundation. Boundary survey before permanent works. Income proof before EMI expansion.
project.why4Body: All public claims are conservative and verifiable. No overpromising. Bank officers and government stakeholders are the primary audience for all documentation.
project.locationSubtitle: All operations are based at Kutirchar village. Site visits available by appointment.
project.landStatus1: Zone A land documents — under review
project.roadmapSubtitle: Six phases from verification to scale. Each phase requires documented evidence from the previous before proceeding. No skipping.
project.roadmapStopRule: This roadmap is illustrative. Phase 1 does not begin until all Phase 0 verification items are completed and documented. Phase 2 does not begin until Phase 1 outputs are stable for a minimum observation period.
project.positioningSubtitle: Who this project is for — and what it is not.
project.pos1Body: Clear land documentation, phase-gated investment, verifiable income progression, conservative EMI discipline, and stop-rule governance.
project.pos2Body: Proof-based circular farm model, soil and water verification first, biogas subsidy eligibility in later phases.
project.pos3Body: Rural livelihood integration, food security (silage, organic fertilizer), circular energy, local employment.
project.pos4Body: Asset-backed (family land), conservative phase progression, no hype, verifiable output at each stage.
project.bdDairyDesc: Rising feed costs, labor scarcity, and smallholder vulnerability make Sirajganj — being in the Milk Vita belt with existing dairy infrastructure — the ideal location for this evidence-first model.
project.bdClimateDesc: Flood preparation, heatwave management, erosion monitoring. Sirajganj riverine communities face flooding, heatwaves, and erosion. This farm's phase-gated approach enables anticipatory adaptation.
project.bdCommunityImpactDesc: Local employment, training, women's inclusion, knowledge transfer. Contributing to Bangladesh's national food security and SDG goals.
project.bdFoodSecurityDesc: This model contributes to Bangladesh's SDG goals — Zero Hunger (SDG 2), Clean Energy (SDG 7), and Climate Action (SDG 13).

proof.heroSubtitle: Bank-ready, government-ready, investor-ready. All open gaps are publicly documented. No hidden issues. Evidence-first at every step.
proof.privacyNotice: 🔒 Privacy Policy: No NID, PIN, bank account numbers, sensitive IDs, or private legal documents are published on this website. Only safe summaries and redacted proof are shown publicly.
proof.auditSubtitle: Real-time status of all verification requirements. Updated as progress is made. Open gaps mean those phases have not started.
proof.stopRule1: No SPT soil test → no G+5 foundation finalization
proof.stopRule2: No boundary lock → no permanent work
proof.stopRule4: Zone B non-private/ejmali → removable-only. No permanent RCC, no room, no septic
proof.stopRule5: EMI must stay within ≤ 50% of proven rolling 12-month income
proof.stopRule6: No permanent structure on Zone B until legal verification passes
proof.stopRule7: No Phase 2 start until Phase 1 is stable and documented
proof.evidenceSubtitle: Downloadable documentation available to qualified stakeholders (bank, government, serious investors) upon formal request.
proof.ev1Note: Title deed and ownership chain under review. Summary PDF available on request — no NID or sensitive IDs included.
proof.ev2Note: SPT soil test not yet conducted. Required before any foundation planning. Scheduled for Phase 0 completion.
proof.ev3Note: Boundary demarcation survey not yet complete. Surveyor appointed. Target: before Phase 1.
proof.ev4Note: Site level and drainage outlet survey required before earthwork or land filling.
proof.ev5Note: Ejmali confirmation from upazila land office in progress. Current status: non-private use only (removable structures).
proof.ev6Note: Official brand name, logo, colors, and identity system locked. 21 June 2026. Status: FINAL/FIXED.
proof.evidenceHowTo: How to request the full evidence pack: Use the Contact page to submit a formal inquiry. Select "Bank / Govt / Investor" as the inquiry type and describe your purpose. We will share appropriate documentation based on your role and requirements. No NID, PIN, or private legal documents are shared publicly.
proof.zoneSubtitle: Two zones with different legal status, different rules. This distinction is fundamental to all planning decisions.
proof.zoneADesc: Full ownership. Subject to SPT soil test before foundation. Permanent structures allowed after all Phase 0 verifications pass. G+5 potential after soil test gate.
proof.zoneBDesc: Legal status under verification. Until ejmali confirmation, ONLY removable structures are permitted. No concrete, no RCC, no permanent plumbing.
proof.zoneBStopRule: Permanent RCC / room / septic on Zone B = ZERO until legal verification completes.
proof.ctaBody: For bank credit officers, government departments, NGOs, or serious investors who need a formal evidence pack. Submit your inquiry with your role and purpose.
proof.bdBiogasDesc: Nationally, biogas plants frequently stop working due to feedstock shortage, poor maintenance, and floods. Our mitigation plan includes feedstock reserve, maintenance schedule, and vet support.
proof.bdAIDesc: 58% of farmers face medium-level problems adopting AI. Our rigorous record system (dam ID, semen breed, bull ID, technician, PD date) addresses the exact gaps that cause failure in Bangladesh.
proof.bdClimateRiskDesc: Flood probability, erosion risk, heatwave impact on livestock. All risks are documented and mitigation plans are in place.
proof.bdPolicyAlignDesc: NDC (6.7% GHG reduction), SDG 2 (Zero Hunger), SDG 7 (Clean Energy), SDG 13 (Climate Action) — this farm aligns with all relevant national frameworks.

ecosystem.heroSubtitle: Cattle, energy, soil, and food in one closed loop. Every waste becomes an input. Every input reduces cost. Every cycle builds resilience.
ecosystem.flowSubtitle: The core logic of the Kutirchar EcoFarm circular system. Each arrow is a real, documented transfer of value.
ecosystem.loopRestart: Circular loop restarts — Napier feeds cattle again
ecosystem.sys1Note: Phase 1: Pilot cattle barn on Zone A
ecosystem.sys3Note: Phase 3+: After biogas digester is operational
ecosystem.whySubtitle: Each loop in the system reduces dependence on purchased inputs and increases farm resilience.
ecosystem.why1Body: Bio-slurry replaces chemical fertilizer. Napier silage reduces feed purchase. Biogas replaces LPG.
ecosystem.why2Body: Manure → biogas → bio-slurry → fertilizer → fodder → manure. Nothing is wasted.
ecosystem.why3Body: Documented circular outputs create verifiable income streams at each phase. Clear audit trail.
ecosystem.why4Body: Bio-slurry improves soil organic matter over time. Long-term land value improvement.
ecosystem.why5Body: Solar + biogas combination reduces dependence on grid and LPG supply chains.
ecosystem.why6Body: Digital monitoring ensures all outputs are measured and documented for governance purposes.
ecosystem.bdBiogasDesc: Nationally, biogas plants frequently discontinue due to feedstock shortage, poor maintenance, and external shocks. Our approach: feedstock reserve planning, scheduled maintenance, vet health monitoring, and flood-protected digester design.
ecosystem.bdFeedCostDesc: Nationally, feed costs are 65–75% of dairy operations. With silage production, we target 45–55% — a 20–30% reduction. This is critical for Bangladesh's rising feed cost crisis.
ecosystem.bdCircularPolicyDesc: Methane capture via biogas directly contributes to Bangladesh's NDC (6.7% unconditional GHG reduction by 2030). Biogas is central to the $3.6 billion clean energy investment strategy.
ecosystem.bdManureMgmtDesc: Nationally, manure management is inadequate. This farm treats manure as a resource — not a waste — through biogas digestion and bio-slurry production.

products.heroSubtitle: Phase-gated offerings. We only offer what we can currently deliver. Future services are labelled Next or Later — they are not yet available.
products.nowSubtitle: Vendor onboarding, partnerships, and consultation discussions are open today.
products.nextSubtitle: Available only after Phase 1 verification gates are passed. Not yet active.
products.laterSubtitle: Far future. Only unlocked after all preceding phases are verified and stable.
products.now1Body: Accepting quotes from certified soil testing labs. Priority: SPT bore testing for Zone A foundation planning. Contact us to submit vendor credentials.
products.now2Body: Boundary survey contractor required for Zone A land demarcation and Zone B survey. Must be licensed by the district land office.
products.now3Body: Requesting solar installation quotes for 100–500W rooftop system. Must include installation, wiring, inverter, and monitoring.
products.now4Body: Open to discussions with NGOs, development organisations, and agricultural institutions about Phase 1–2 collaboration. No commitments yet — discussions only.
products.next1Body: When Phase 1 cattle operations are stable: fresh dairy for local sale. Volume will be small (2–3 cows). No claims until animals are in place and health records exist.
products.next2Body: Pilot organic compost from cattle manure and Napier residue. For local farmers and home gardens. Volume TBD after pilot.
products.next2Gate: Gate: Phase 1 stable, manure accumulation sufficient
products.next3Body: Fresh Napier grass surplus available to nearby livestock farmers. Subject to seasonal availability and our own feed requirements.
products.next4Body: Liquid organic fertilizer from biogas digester effluent. For local farmers as soil amendment. Pricing and volume after Phase 3.
products.later1Body: Educational visits and training on circular farming, biogas operation, and digital monitoring. Available after Phase 3 is stable and digital monitoring is live.
products.later1Gate: Gate: Phase 3 verified + monitoring system operational
products.later2Body: Live farm dashboard demonstration for agricultural institutions, development organisations, and other farmers. After our own monitoring system is proven.
products.later2Gate: Gate: Starlink + CCTV + dashboard fully operational
products.later3Body: Demand-gated only. A small guest/service accommodation on Zone A (after all legal verifications). Will not be planned until rental demand is formally verified through inquiry records.
products.later3Gate: Gate: Legal clearance + verified demand + Phase 4 stable
products.later4Body: Advising rural farms on circular energy and documentation best practices. Far future — only after Kutirchar EcoFarm is a proven and documented reference site.
products.later4Gate: Gate: All phases 0–4 completed & externally verified
products.stopRule: Later-phase services are not currently available and are not guaranteed. They are listed only to show the potential direction of the project after all required verification gates have been passed and documented.
products.ctaBody: Whether you are a vendor, buyer, partner, or investor — submit a specific inquiry and we will respond within 3 business days.
products.bdMarketContextDesc: Local milk price: ৳60–80/liter. Goat Eid market: premium pricing. Compost demand growing. Buyer route: Milk Vita collection → local sweet shops → direct delivery. Pricing will be locked after evidence is collected.

digital.heroSubtitle: Connectivity, security, power backup, and monitoring — framed as operational reliability and governance infrastructure, not internet hype.
digital.archSubtitle: Starlink Core · Power & Protection · Network & Security. Each module is independent and gate-controlled.
digital.mod1Item4: Clear sky view test at site
digital.stopRule: Digital infrastructure must not be treated as a "nice to have." It is a governance requirement — CCTV footage provides tamper-evident evidence for insurance, governance, and partner reporting. NVR local storage is mandatory before any cloud storage is considered.
digital.gatesSubtitle: Each system has gates that must be confirmed before installation proceeds.
digital.sys1Desc: High-speed satellite internet for remote farm monitoring, dashboard access, and real-time reporting.
digital.sys1Gate4: Clear sky view test passed at site
digital.sys2Desc: IP camera coverage of cattle barn, biogas site, and main entrance. Local NVR storage first, cloud second.
digital.sys2Gate2: NVR local storage setup (priority over cloud)
digital.sys3Desc: Uninterruptible power supply to protect CCTV, monitoring, and network during load-shedding.
digital.sys3Gate3: UPS connection verified with solar output
digital.sys4Desc: Local network setup for NVR, cameras, and monitoring devices. Starlink as WAN when available.
digital.sys4Gate2: Cable routing plan for barn + biogas area
digital.sys4Out1: Local LAN for all monitoring devices
digital.sequenceSubtitle: Do not skip the order. Each step depends on the previous.
digital.seq1Note: Install UPS and grounding system first. Everything else depends on stable power.
digital.seq2Note: Set up local NVR storage and IP cameras on internal LAN. No cloud yet. Record locally.
digital.seq3Note: Segment network: cameras isolated from management devices.
digital.seq4Note: Only after steps 1–3 are operational. Connect Starlink as WAN gateway for remote access.
digital.seq5Note: Only after Starlink and local infrastructure are verified. Dashboard is the final layer.
digital.bdDigitalDivideDesc: Only 30% of rural farmers use e-technology. Key barriers: poor mobile network, lack of awareness, affordability. This farm's Starlink + CCTV + dashboard approach demonstrates that digital agriculture works in char-land — bridging the gap for rural Bangladesh.
digital.bdStarlinkBDDesc: Regulatory status, availability, and cost in BDT to be confirmed. Service address portability is a key gate before purchase.
digital.bdRuralImpactDesc: Farm connectivity enables: vet teleconsultation, real-time market price checking, remote training, and governance documentation.

updates.heroSubtitle: A living trust engine. Transparent, date-stamped updates showing progress, open gaps, evidence added, and next steps. No hype — only facts.
updates.editorialNote: 📸 Photo-first · Evidence-referenced · No confidential IDs · Updated as progress occurs
updates.emptyState: No updates in this category yet.
updates.reportSubtitle: Our commitment to transparent, evidence-first communication.
updates.report1Body: Every update is dated. Nothing is backdated or modified without notation.
updates.report2Body: Claims reference specific documentation, available to qualified stakeholders on formal request. No claim without supporting evidence.
updates.report3Body: We publicly show what is not done. Gaps are not hidden — they drive the work.
updates.report4Body: No NID, PIN, bank details, or sensitive personal identifiers ever published.
updates.bdClimateLogDesc: Flood, heatwave, and erosion events affecting the farm and surrounding area, with documented response measures.
updates.bdPolicyFeedDesc: New DLS circulars, SREDA net metering updates, IDCOL biogas subsidy news, and other relevant national policy developments.
updates.bdCommunityMetricsDesc: Local jobs created, people trained, knowledge shared, and other measurable community impact indicators.

contact.heroSubtitle: Submit a specific inquiry. We respond to all formal inquiries within 3 business days. Select your inquiry type so we can direct it correctly.
contact.visitLabel: Would you like to arrange a visit?
contact.visitYes: Yes, I'd like to visit the farm
contact.successBody: We have received your inquiry. We typically respond within 3 business days. A copy of your inquiry has been sent to your email.
contact.errorBody: There was an error submitting your form. Please try emailing us directly at info@kutircharecofarm.com
contact.errorContact: Provide at least phone or email
contact.errorMessage: Message must be at least 20 characters
contact.type1Desc: Formal due diligence, evidence pack request, or investment discussion
contact.type2Desc: Soil test, survey, solar, biogas, CCTV, or construction quote
contact.type3Desc: Dairy, compost, silage, bio-slurry (Next phase offerings)
contact.type4Desc: Farm tour or training inquiry (Later phase)
contact.responseCommitment: Response commitment: Bank/Govt/Investor inquiries — within 24–48 hours. Buyer/Vendor inquiries — within 3–5 business days.
contact.bnNote: বাংলায় যোগাযোগ করতে পারেন — আমরা উভয় ভাষায় সাড়া দেব। (You can reach us in Bengali — we respond in both languages.)
contact.visitProtocol: Visit protocol: By appointment only — Monday to Thursday, 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM. Submit an inquiry first to schedule.
contact.bdInquiryBuckets: বাংলাদেশ-নির্দিষ্ট অনুসন্ধান: কৃষি ঋণ (BB refinance), সরকারি প্রকল্প (DLS/BLRI), NGO/CSR (PKSF/BRAC), বিনিয়োগকারী

faq.heroSubtitle: Honest, evidence-first answers about Kutirchar EcoFarm. Project, financing, Zone B, privacy, and visits.
faq.a1: A proof-based, phased rural smart farm and circular energy ecosystem in Kutirchar, Sirajganj, Bangladesh. Integrates cattle, biogas, Napier silage, bio-slurry fertilizer, rooftop solar, and digital monitoring on private family land.
faq.q2: What phase is the project currently in?
faq.a2: Phase 0: Verification and Foundation. Land document review, boundary survey planning, soil test arrangements, Zone B ejmali status verification, and drainage survey. No construction until all Phase 0 complete.
faq.a3: Conservative financial policy. Monthly EMI stays within 50 percent of verified rolling 12-month income. Internal revenue funds each phase. External financing only after stable income.
faq.q4: What is Zone B and what is allowed there?
faq.a4: Zone B is 12 decimal non-private/ejmali land under legal verification. Only removable structures permitted: fodder racks, temporary shade, portable compost, loading area, removable water tank. No concrete or permanent structures.
faq.a5: By appointment only. Submit inquiry via Contact page. Location: Kutirchar, Bhadraghat, Kamarkhanda, Sirajganj, Bangladesh.
faq.a6: Credibility through transparency. Built for bank officers, government, and investors. Open gaps prove we know what to work on, nothing hidden.
faq.q7: How to apply as vendor or partner?
faq.a7: Use Contact form. Select Vendor/Contractor or Partnership/NGO/CSR. Describe qualifications and proposal.
faq.a8: Only what is needed to respond. Never NID, PIN, bank details, or sensitive documents. See Privacy page.
faq.a9: Sirajganj is flood-prone. Our approach: Zone B removable-only structures, phased investment so no capital is at risk before proof, flood-resistant digester design in Phase 3.
faq.a10: Nationally, BD biogas plants frequently stop working. Our mitigation: feedstock reserve, scheduled maintenance, vet health monitoring, and flood-protected digester.
faq.a11: Nationally, 58% farmers face medium problems with AI. Our record system tracks dam ID, semen breed, bull ID, technician, and PD date — addressing the exact gaps that cause failure.
faq.a12: Sirajganj is in the Milk Vita belt. Local milk price: ৳60–80/liter. Buyers include Milk Vita collection points, local sweet shops, and direct delivery customers.
faq.a13: Zone A (10 decimal) is private family land. Zone B (12 decimal) is non-private/ejmali — legal verification pending. Family land is not for sale.
faq.a14: Submit a formal inquiry via the Contact page selecting 'Bank / Government / Investor'. We will share the evidence pack and discuss terms.
faq.moreQs: More questions? Reach us at info@kutircharecofarm.com

privacy.heroSubtitle: What information we collect, how we use it, and what we never publish.
privacy.collectBody: Only the information you provide through the contact form: name, organisation, email, phone, and message. We use this solely to respond to your inquiry.
privacy.neverTitle: What We Never Collect or Publish
privacy.neverBody: NID (National ID), PIN, bank account numbers, credit/debit card details, sensitive legal documents, or private identifiers. These are never stored, processed, or published on this website.
privacy.cookiesBody: We use a minimal cookie to store your language preference. No tracking cookies, no advertising cookies, no third-party analytics cookies. We use Plausible/Umami (cookieless, privacy-respecting analytics) if enabled.
privacy.shareBody: We do not sell, trade, or share your personal information with third parties. Information is only used to respond to your inquiry and is retained only as long as necessary.
privacy.rightsBody: You may request deletion of your data at any time by contacting info@kutircharecofarm.com. We will comply within 30 days.

execSummary.heroSubtitle: A concise overview of Kutirchar EcoFarm — the project, its phases, governance model, and investment case.
execSummary.body1: Kutirchar EcoFarm is a proof-based, phase-gated smart farm and circular energy ecosystem located in Kutirchar, Bhadraghat, Kamarkhanda, Sirajganj, Bangladesh. The project integrates cattle and dairy farming, biogas production, Napier silage, bio-slurry fertilizer, rooftop solar, and digital farm monitoring.
execSummary.body2: The project follows a strict Stage-Gate model: 6 phases from verification (Phase 0) to demand-gated services (Phase 5). Each phase requires documented evidence from the previous stage before proceeding. No skipping, no overpromising.
execSummary.body3: Key differentiators: evidence-first governance, public audit ledger, stop rules for every decision, bilingual (Bangla/English) transparency, and alignment with Bangladesh's NDC and SDG goals.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.body: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

phaseLabels.p0i3: SPT soil test for foundation planning
phaseLabels.p0i5: Zone B ejmali status legal clarification
phaseLabels.p1i1: Hygienic cattle barn on Zone A (gate: all Phase 0 docs verified)
phaseLabels.p1i2: First 2–3 local cows with Napier fodder cultivation
phaseLabels.p2i1: Compost processing from first batch (gate: livestock stable)
phaseLabels.p2i4: Local vegetable inputs from bio-slurry output
phaseLabels.p3i1: 6m³ biogas digester installation (gate: consistent manure input)
phaseLabels.p3i2: Cooking gas for farm use — reduce LPG cost
phaseLabels.p3i5: Silage field expansion to adjacent Napier plots
phaseLabels.p4i1: Larger biogas system (gate: Phase 3 stable for 3+ months)
phaseLabels.p4i2: Bio-slurry commercial sale to local farmers
phaseLabels.p4i4: Training/farm tour programme (gate: digital monitoring live)
phaseLabels.p5i1: Service apartment (gate: verified demand + legal clearance)
phaseLabels.p5i3: Smart monitoring demo for partner farms
phaseLabels.p5i4: All Phase 5 items require explicit proof from Phases 0–4

auditRows.ar1StopRule: No permanent construction until clear title confirmed
auditRows.ar2StopRule: No foundation planning until boundary pegs set & mapped
auditRows.ar3StopRule: No G+5 foundation decision without SPT result
auditRows.ar4StopRule: No blind filling or earthwork without drainage outlet clarity
auditRows.ar5Evidence: Legal opinion pending from upazila land office
auditRows.ar5StopRule: Zone B: removable use only until ejmali status legally confirmed
auditRows.ar6Evidence: Post address currently shows older village name
auditRows.ar6StopRule: Resolve before official documents (bank forms, government applications)
auditRows.ar7Evidence: Phase 5 only — not relevant in current phase
auditRows.ar7StopRule: No service apartment planning until demand is verified through formal inquiry records
